message:
fix(build): add bundled SQLite for Windows, fix platform warnings

The published sqlmodel-sqlite crate is missing the
[target.'cfg(windows)'.dependencies] section for libsqlite3-sys,
causing the Windows release build to fail with:
  LINK : fatal error LNK1181: cannot open input file 'sqlite3.lib'

Add libsqlite3-sys with bundled-windows as a direct dependency so the
Windows CI build can link correctly. Also bump sqlmodel-sqlite and
sqlmodel-core to 0.2.1, and suppress all Windows-only compiler
warnings (unused variables/mut behind #[cfg(unix)] blocks) using
targeted #[cfg_attr(not(unix), ...)] attributes.

Fixes #48.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,25 @@ Repository: <https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/pi_agent_rust>
 
 ---
 
+## [v0.1.11] — 2026-04-15 — Release
+
+### Bug Fixes
+
+- **Fix Windows build**: Add `libsqlite3-sys` with `bundled-windows` as a direct
+  dependency. The published `sqlmodel-sqlite` crate was missing the
+  `[target.'cfg(windows)'.dependencies]` section, causing
+  `LINK : fatal error LNK1181: cannot open input file 'sqlite3.lib'` on MSVC.
+  Fixes [#48](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/pi_agent_rust/issues/48).
+- **Fix Windows compiler warnings**: Suppress platform-conditional unused
+  variable/mut warnings in `rpc.rs`, `tools.rs`, `doctor.rs`, and
+  `session_store_v2.rs` using targeted `#[cfg_attr(not(unix), ...)]` attributes.
+
+### Dependencies
+
+- Bump `sqlmodel-sqlite` and `sqlmodel-core` from 0.2.0 to 0.2.1.
+
+---
+
 ## [Unreleased] (after v0.1.9)
 
 Commits since v0.1.9 tag (2026-03-12) through 2026-03-21.

-version = "0.1.10"
+version = "0.1.11"

 description = "High-performance AI coding agent CLI - Rust port of Pi Agent"
@@ -79,8 +79,8 @@ fs4 = "0.13"
 glob = "0.3"
 ignore = "0.4"
 crossbeam-queue = "0.3"
-sqlmodel-sqlite = { version = "0.2.0" }
-sqlmodel-core = { version = "0.2.0" }
+sqlmodel-sqlite = { version = "0.2.1" }
+sqlmodel-core = { version = "0.2.1" }
 
 # Time
 chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
@@ -164,6 +164,12 @@ harness = false
 [target.'cfg(not(target_env = "msvc"))'.dependencies]
 tikv-jemallocator = { version = "0.6", optional = true }
 
+# Windows: provide bundled SQLite for sqlmodel-sqlite's FFI linkage.
+# The published sqlmodel-sqlite crate is missing this target dep; without it
+# the linker fails with "cannot open input file 'sqlite3.lib'" on MSVC.
+[target.'cfg(windows)'.dependencies]
+libsqlite3-sys = { version = "0.37", features = ["bundled-windows"] }
+
 [features]
 default = ["image-resize", "jemalloc", "clipboard", "wasm-host", "sqlite-sessions"]
 image-resize = ["image"]
